title: Harness Fixture
description: Evaluation test case (input snapshot); must be redacted

_comment.description: Optional human-readable comment; ignored by tooling.

content_hash.description: sha256 of the fixture's serialized input file as written on disk (UTF-8 byte-stream of the JSON file containing the `input` field). Reproducible by `sha256sum <fixture-input-file>`. Avoids canonical-JSON serialization fragility.

input.description: Scenario-specific structured input; exact fields are defined by the scenario

redacted.description: The fixture must already be redacted; this field must be true for the fixture to be committed

redaction_rules_version.description: Version of the redaction rules, for traceability

license.description: Required when the source is a public dataset
